title: pectis angustifolia var. angustifolia
intro: Pectis angustifolia var. angustifolia, also known as narrowleaf false healall, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the Americas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pectis angustifolia var. angustifolia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from fever and pain. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
